task.title: Monitoring and Observability Setup
task.description: Deploy Prometheus, Grafana, and logging stack for system observability

implementation.details:
1. Install Prometheus operator and Prometheus instance
2. Deploy Grafana with AlertHub dashboards
3. Set up log aggregation with Loki or ELK
4. Configure alert rules for SLA monitoring
5. Create service monitors for all components

task.acceptance_criteria: Prometheus collecting metrics from all services, Grafana dashboards loading, alerts firing for test conditions
